Project.NAME: @osovv/vv-opencode
Project.annotation: Portable OpenCode workflow package with plugins and a Bun CLI for install, sync, and cross-device setup.

M-CLI-CONFIG.NAME: OpenCodeConfigTools
M-CLI-CONFIG.purpose: Path resolution, JSONC-aware config mutation, pinned plugin registration, managed Guardian config rendering, and installation inspection with separated vvoc roots.

fn-resolvePaths.PURPOSE: Resolve OpenCode config paths and vvoc-managed config paths for the selected scope.

fn-ensurePackageInstalled.PURPOSE: Add the pinned vvoc package specifier to the OpenCode plugin array if needed.

fn-syncGuardianConfig.PURPOSE: Rewrite managed Guardian config while preserving current values.

M-CLI-COMMANDS.NAME: VVOCCommands
M-CLI-COMMANDS.purpose: Compose the `vvoc` CLI and expose install, sync, status, doctor, version, and Guardian config commands.

export-install.PURPOSE: Bootstrap package registration and optional Guardian config.

M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.NAME: GuardianPlugin
M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.purpose: Review OpenCode permission requests using a constrained Guardian agent and safe fallback behavior.

export-GuardianPlugin.PURPOSE: Register Guardian hooks for config, events, tool intent capture, and permission review.

M-PLUGIN-MEMORY-STORE.NAME: MemoryStore
M-PLUGIN-MEMORY-STORE.purpose: Store explicit memory under the vvoc XDG data root, keep shared scope global across projects, resolve scopes, and provide lexical ranking for search.

fn-loadMemoryRuntimeConfig.PURPOSE: Load global and project vvoc memory settings.

fn-putMemory.PURPOSE: Create a scoped memory entry in the vvoc XDG data root.

fn-searchMemories.PURPOSE: Return ranked lexical matches across scoped entries.

M-PLUGIN-MEMORY.NAME: MemoryPlugin
M-PLUGIN-MEMORY.purpose: Add explicit memory tools to OpenCode and register the `memory-reviewer` subagent.

export-MemoryPlugin.PURPOSE: Register memory tools and the report-only reviewer subagent.
